name: scenario_MirrorModifier_pipeline
description: Pipeline with a mirror modifier: NoiseEffect renders one quadrant, MirrorModifier reflects across X and Y to produce a kaleidoscope. Used to verify the MirrorModifier wires into Layer cleanly and that the full pipeline still meets its FPS bound.

steps.name: add-grid
steps.description: Add a 128x128 GridLayout child to Layouts. Set explicitly (the module default is 16x16x1) so the tick is measurable above the host's microsecond clock.

steps.name: add-layer
steps.description: Add a Layer wired to Layouts (RGB).

steps.name: add-noise
steps.description: Add NoiseEffect as the Layer's effect.

steps.name: add-mirror
steps.description: Add MirrorModifier so logical pixels reflect across X and Y in the physical grid.

steps.name: add-driver-group
steps.description: Add a Drivers container wired to the Layer's output buffer.

steps.name: add-artnet
steps.description: Add ArtNetSendDriver and run the bounded FPS measurement (mirror + LUT path must stay at >=80% of the rated FPS).
